code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut total = 0
  for p in parts
    match string.parse_int(p)
    when Some(n)
      if n > 0
        total = total + n
      else if n < 0
        total = total - n
      end
    when None
      total = total
    end
  end
  println("r=#{total}")
when None
  println("r=0")
end
